title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HealthifyMe - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
